# Font conversion fixtures

These base64-encoded fixtures come from the FontTools test suite at commit
`386243ed95d6a42114f7695f21de3ef45524108a` and are covered by the FontTools
MIT license.

| --- | --- | --- |

| `test-otf.base64` | `Tests/ttx/data/TestOTF.otf` | `21c56133f7c02e2d9acc4b6aaa2965fe63572a212393ad369d3afb3da453d591` |
| `test-woff2.base64` | `Tests/ttx/data/TestWOFF2.woff2` | `d4d6a624b2a1ce317702dd2be6742b05244087984d5b30fd0a8917b1be616a8a` |
